title: Signature Attractions
description: From the depths of the Dubai Aquarium to the spectacle of the Dubai Fountain, The Dubai Mall anchors the city's most iconic experiences—driving dwell time, tourism, and repeat visitation.

items.title: Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo
items.description: One of the world's largest suspended aquariums—10 million litres of marine habitat, tunnel walks, and premium animal encounters that anchor family and tourist traffic.

items.title: Underwater Zoo
items.description: Immersive edutainment across rainforest, rocky shore, and UAE night creature zones—extending aquarium dwell time and premium ticketing.

items.title: The Dubai Fountain
items.description: The world's largest choreographed fountain system—an external spectacle synced with Downtown Dubai that draws evening crowds and global media moments.

items.title: Dubai Ice Rink
items.description: Olympic-size rink programming—public sessions, hockey, and events—adding all-season entertainment and group bookings to the mall mix.

items.title: VR Park
items.description: Location-based virtual reality at scale—high-throughput attractions for youth, tourists, and birthday/group packages.

items.title: Souk Al Bahar & Luxury Zones
items.description: Arabesque retail adjacency and premium corridors connecting heritage-inspired merchandising with global luxury demand.

items.title: Events & Tourist Activations
items.description: Seasonal festivals, brand pop-ups, and tourism partnerships that keep The Dubai Mall perpetually newsworthy across GCC and global channels.
